title: OriginationServiceTypeValues
description:
Capturing the customers request for a product.

Comment:
Example: A customer submits a loan application online or at the branch.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Verification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Verifying KYC, identity, and collateral documents.

Comment:
Example: Checking ID, address proof, and property documents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Assessment Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluating the customers creditworthiness and risk.

Comment:
Example: Calculating credit score and debt-to-income ratio.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Authorization Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Approval & Authorization Service: Approving or rejecting the origination request based on evaluation.

Comment:
Example: Credit committee approves a mortgage loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Activation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Activating the financial product for customer use after approval.

Comment:
Example: Disbursing funds for a loan or issuing a credit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Notification Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Informing the customer about the status of the origination process.

Comment:
Example: Email or SMS confirming loan approval.
